articles.author: Haley Britzky
articles.title: Trump is cutting the numbers of US troops in Europe. Here’s how - CNN
articles.description: This week Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth abruptly cancelled two US military deployments to Europe and ordered the removal of other personnel from the continent, according to two defense officials, in a series of moves meant to reduce the number of US troops f…
